import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Button } from 'reactstrap'; const Form = () => { const [ state, setState ] = useState({ parameter: "", unit: "", standard: "", types: "" }) const {parameter, unit, standard, types} = state; const handleInputChange = (e) => { let {name, value} = e.target; setState({ ...state, [name]: value}) } return (
) } export default Form
